Item.Text: Show the points index of 3D objects
Item.Description:
This node displays the index of each point of one or more 3D geometry objects directly in ALLPLAN.
**Supported geometry types:**
`Line3D` — displays index of StartPoint (0) and EndPoint (1)
`Polyline3D`, `Polygon3D`, `Spline3D`, `BSpline3D` — displays index of each point in the `.Points` collection
`Polyhedron3D` — displays index of each vertex via `GetVerticesCount()` / `GetVertex(i)`
- `BRep3D` — displays index of each vertex via `GetVertexCount()` / `GetVertex(i)`
- **Typical Use:**
Quickly inspect the point order of a geometry before using `GetVertex` or similar operations
Verify vertex winding direction (CW / CCW) on a `Polygon3D` or `BRep3D`
- Debug geometry created dynamically in a PythonPart script
- **Example:**
Objects=`Polyline3D` with 4 points
TextHeight=`50`
**Result:**
- Numbers **0, 1, 2, 3** are drawn at each vertex position in the preview, centred on the point and using the default pen/color of the PythonPart.
- **Note:**
This node is **preview-only**.
It produces no permanent geometry in the drawing.
Indices always start at **0**.
## Links
[Help](https://github.com/cmaignan-source/vsnodes/blob/main/VisualScripts/ALLPLAN%20FRANCE/README-PointIndexPreview.md)
